StartingFurniture.AllowValues: Standard, Fishing, Foraging, Mining, Combat, Corners, Island, Ranching
StartingFurniture.Description: The style of starting furniture you want your new IF4 save to have.

RedShedCoordsX.Description: Number. X coordinate for where you want the top left corner of the Red Shed to be placed.

RedShedCoordsY.Description: Number. Y coordinate for where you want the top left corner of the Red Shed to be placed.

DisableIF4FarmCave.Description: Set this to true if you want to use someone else's farm cave map.

UseIF4Greenhouse.Description: Set this to false if you want to use someone else's greenhouse map.

UseIF4WorldMap.Description: Set this to false if you do not want to use IF4's world map.

UseIF4GreenhouseExterior.Description: Set this to false if you do not want to use IF4's eemie-Victorian exterior greenhouse recolor.

AddSouthBusStopPath.Description: Set this to false if you do not want to add a path from the bus stop to the farm.

AddSecretWoodsShortcut.Description: Set this to false if you do not want the 2-way shortcut to the Secret Woods from the Farm.

PlaceMultipleRedShed.Description: Set this to false if you do not want multiple red sheds.

RemoveFarmVolcano.Description: Set this to true if you want to remove the volcano on the farm.

RemoveCommunityKitchen.Description: Set this to true if you want to remove the community kitchen on the farm.

RemoveCoop.Description: Set this to true if you want to remove the coop on the farm.

RemoveBarn.Description: Set this to true if you want to remove the barn on the farm.

RemoveHut.Description: Set this to true if you want to remove the hut on the farm.

RemoveStand.Description: Set this to true if you want to remove the stand on the farm.

UseBusStopTilesheetAtAnimalFences.Description: Set this to false if you do not want to align vanilla bus stop tilesheets with the farm.

UseAnimalFencing.Description: Set this to false if you do not want an area of fences for animals.

PathToTunnel.Description: Set this to false if you do not want a path to the tunnel area.

RemoveBeachUmbrella.Description: Set this to false if you do not want an umbrella on the beach.

RemoveBeachGrill.Description: Set this to false if you do not want a grill on the beach.

RemoveBeachSkeleton.Description: Set this to false if you do not want the skeleton on the beach.

RemoveCustomTrees.Description: Set this to false if you do not want custom trees.

RemoveFenceWest.Description: Set this to false if you do not want fences near the west side of the farm.

RemoveBackyardDoor.Description: Set this to false if you do not want the backyard door warp.

ReplaceBeachFarm.Description: Set this to true if you want to override the Beach farm in addition to adding a new farm type -- you need this for saves that were created before the custom farm type was added.
